issues.description: No separate styles.css file — all CSS is embedded in a <style> tag. Functional but not ideal for maintainability or caching.
No :focus-visible outline styles defined. While there are no interactive elements currently, adding focus indicators is recommended for accessibility when links/buttons are added.
Minimal semantic structure — only <main> is used. Missing <header>, <nav>, <footer>, and <section> elements expected for a full landing page per a11y guidelines.
No app.js file exists — no JavaScript functionality or DOM selector mismatches to check. Page is static HTML only.
